calendar.matters:
Objections To Fiduciary'S Account And Request For Surcharge Of Fiduciary And Other Remedies
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Michael Cramer, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Tonia White, Trust Beneficiary/Objector.

Nadya Machrus, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Anthony Golden, Respondent.

Damon Victor, in court, in propria persona, Interested Party.

The court at the outset recognizes that the Trustee lives in Hercules and that the principal place of administration was in Walnut Creek so there is an issue of whether San Francisco is the proper venue as both of those cities are in Contra Costa County. Mr. Cramer offers advocacy on the venue issue. Ms. Machrus does not provide additional testimony and submits on the objection filed with the court. The court advises that it intends to take the instant petition off calendar and transfer the matter to Contra Costa County. After additional discussion, the subject matter shall be dismissed without prejudice so that Mr. Cramer can file his petition in Contra Costa County and accordingly, the court will no longer transfer the matter.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.

Objections To Fiduciary'S Account And Request For Surcharge Of Fiduciary And Other Remedies
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Continued To Feb-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
